hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|git push --force|DELETE FROM.*WHERE|TRUNCATE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command — run manually if intended' >&2; exit 2; fi
cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true
echo '✓ Session paused. Before committing: [ ] typecheck clean [ ] lint clean [ ] manual tested [ ] French verified [ ] git committed'
